textByHashes.82fa60847b4223b8aa7cd1a41daf3f1dbbe12220: Not bad. It's better than being at that blasted camp, though I do wish I had my own ship.
textByHashes.be9189d023ea307ec7b8eb3ba5fc73ef3699efc0: That cargo hold's already empty, Captain.
textByHashes.2aae261b1117d82bc2a207cadf43d71563d82db4: Ah, time to stretch my legs!
textByHashes.28e056576a41fea501975e15777c93605b7abae7: Job's done, Captain! Everything from your cargo hold is now in your bank.
textByHashes.7914fe222caa5d909ca0c1b753f7d92b6d9b1158: The bank won't take anything from your cargo hold at the moment. Damn bureaucrats...
textByHashes.f073c0ac1f1c88405161b71a970a09fcf47dcb79: Doing well, thanks! Anything like this beats being behind a desk anyway.
textByHashes.fac47b4da9cbd9bb1edf889a2177b66841e9eb92: Life is easier on the sea.
textByHashes.1f616287672caefd9a8f69f6166aee8f3894e52c: This is so much better than being cooped up in that camp.
textByHashes.059523a32493f43361b93442952fb0700711b600: I'm just happy to be here.
textByHashes.72f25f0a6d6dfee1d57f8ad671c86f8fea447249: This reminds me of my last holiday.
textByHashes.4783c65887ddcec41efdb32fd905bb4c03d5abb6: All looking good on the sails.
textByHashes.c566651a42ead5926200189893cf20456853db6d: I can see something to the !
textByHashes.f6916639893972b8fb238414367ac3d470290866: Trimmed those sails good and proper, Captain!
textByHashes.cf576d7721ef252d634f6d118153fec24751556a: I can't find any ammo in the cargo hold.
textByHashes.093a7f2e51076811af2cdcb20d8a932e307cb802: Sailing was supposed to be peaceful.
textByHashes.4630d113d749d848d5586a17949e8170bf519a62: I can't attack your target, Captain.
textByHashes.73c24322556ebaefd9c23bec9eb5ca9dd920ff69: Managed to hook some salvage! I'll put it in the cargo hold.
textByHashes.d4128c2818b2874deca3fa29c1f0d3c2f9fd3a9b: The cargo hold is full. I can't salvage anything.
textByHashes.e671af915ebfa3edbb7351bc17c14f0511926b37: I can't find any repair kits in the cargo hold.
